title: Gone to Earth
director: Michael Powell, Emeric Pressburger, Rouben Mamoulian
writer: Mary Webb, Michael Powell, Emeric Pressburger
actors: Jennifer Jones, David Farrar, Cyril Cusack
plot: A beautiful, superstitious, animal-loving Gypsy is hotly desired by a fox-hunting squire even after she marries a clergyman.
